name: Ceramic with Brown Knife Pleat Shade Accent Table Lamp Sour Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a decorative accent to your home by lighting up with the Ceramic with Brown Knife Pleat Shade Accent Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This accent table lamp features a ceramic vase-like base that complements the brown shade for a stunning look. Designed with a one-way on and off light setting, this table lamp has an inline (cord) linear slide dimmer switch for easy operation.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
